title: Nick's ModPack
description: Fully compatible with lunar client. Principally optimize the game, but has some other features like 3d skins and better f3
body:
# THIS MODPACK IS ARCHIVED
I decided to archive this since it doesn't do what it should do. You can still download old versions  
The old Discord server was deleted.
<details>
<summary>Old Description</summary>

![My Modpack Banner with black background](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2124a0bb2a5c481c38f5ef5e3e700870919dd7d_0.webp)
## ~~Nick's Modpack "2.0" (My Modpack) is out! Scroll to read more!~~
![Nick's Modpack Banner With Black Background](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/C2slajkE/images/9692c70f17247c552deeb49781458d8e8daf563d.png)
# Overwiew
### THIS APPLIES FOR LAST VERSION, FOR OTHER VERSIONS GO TO THE TAB VERSIONS
This modpack was created for optimazing the game with the compatibly for Lunar Client. So, this modpack has optimazions mods, but also others things like 3D skins and better F3.
<details>
<summary>What's add</summary>
Features:
  
- Perfomace: You have a potato pc, don't worry, there are optimazion mods
- IrisShaders: Mod for use shaders (No shaders included)
- Chat head: see the head in chat of what are chatting
- 3D Skin Layers: See 3d skins
- BetterF3: Make F3 more usable
- FPS Reducer: Don't using minecraft but is open, don't worry, with this mod the fps reduce when you re not playing at minecraft
- LambDynamicLights: This mod adds dynamic lights to Minecraft (Like Optifine).
- ModMenu: All mods on a menu
- SimpleVoiceChat: VoiceChat
- Reese's Sodium Options: Replaces Sodium's Options Screen with intention of improving UX
- Dark Loading Screen: A dark loading screen.
- Apis: They are needed for others things
</details>

<details>
<summary>Mods</summary>
  Mods:
  
- Entity Model Features And Entity Texture Features (For fresh animations)
- 3D Skin Layers
- Almanac
- BadOptimization
- BetterF3
- BetterGrassify
- Chat Heads
- Cloth Config Api
- Cubes Without Borders
- Dark Loading Screen
- Entity Culling
- Fabric Api
- Fabric Language Kotlin
- FerriteCore
- FPS Reducer
- Iris Shaders
- LambDynamicLights
- Let Me Despawn
- Lithium
- ModMenu
- MoreCulling
- Reese's Sodium Options
- Simple Voice Chat
- Sodium
- Sodium Extra
- Text Placeholder API
- Very Many Players
- YetAnotherConfigLib(YACL)
  </details>


<details>
<summary>Resource Pack</summary>
Resource Pack:
  
- 3D Default
- Chat Reporting Helper
- Fresh Animations
- Fresh Animations - Extension (All)
- GUI Revision
- Icons
- Icons - Additions
- Icons Advertisement Removal
</details>

# Other things
This modpack don't contain any Chat Report Remove. 
Report a bug on the discord sever.
My Modpacks are only avaible on Modrinth.

Credits:
- Nick
